'''Ulu Ulix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Ulu Ulix belonged to a species of horned-bipeds with three black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. [[Jedi training/Legends|Training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] as a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Ulix was selected to be the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Glynn-Beti]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When war did erupt between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Ulix took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and was assigned to lead [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in battle alongside his master.<ref name="BFC" />

Joining his master at the [[Conquest of Raxus Prime|battle]] for [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], Ulix and the Republic forces there were instrumental in ending the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] and ensuring that [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] could not access that dangerous power for the Confederacy.<ref name="BFC" /> After the fighting concluded, Ulu Ulix took care of the orphans on the Republic troopship ''[[Candaserri]]'', including young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Ulix was the only Jedi who Fett ever considered a friend. During the [[Battle of Xagobah (Clone Wars)|conflict]] on [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]] Ulix would once more encounter Fett without realizing that he was the son of the notorious [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. As the troops under his master's command were having difficulty attacking their target, the [[Mazariyan]] citadel of [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]], Ulix took it upon himself to infiltrate the facility. When Ulix's [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] was shot down upon his approach to the citadel, Fett rescued the Padawan before he could fall to his death.<ref name="Boba Fett: A New Threat">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>
